title: Peter Sarlin’s QuTwo reaches $380M valuation in angel round
summary: Finnish AI lab QuTwo, founded by former AMD Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, has reached a €325 million ($380 million) valuation following a €25 million angel round. The funding reflects strong investor confidence in AI, quantum computing, and European sovereign technology development.
content: QyTw0, the Finnish AI lab founded by former AMD Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, is now valued at €325 million (approximately $380 million) after raising a €25 million angel round ($29 million). It's a sign of enduring tailwinds for AI, quantum computing, and sovereign tech, especially for Europe-made companies.

zh.title: 彼得·萨林的QuTwo在天使轮融资中估值达3.8亿美元
zh.summary: 由前AMD Silo AI首席执行官彼得·萨林创立的芬兰AI实验室QuTwo，在获得2500万欧元的天使轮融资后，估值达到3.25亿欧元（3.8亿美元）。这笔融资反映了投资者对人工智能、量子计算和欧洲主权技术发展的强烈信心。

title: Marc Lore says that AI will soon enable anyone open a restaurant
summary: Wonder plans to leverage AI-powered robotic kitchens to create "restaurant factories," enabling entrepreneurs to launch virtual food brands through simple prompts. The initiative demonstrates AI's expanding role in food service automation and entrepreneurship.
content: Wonder wants to turn its robotic kitchens into AI-powered “restaurant factories,” letting anyone spin up a virtual food brand with a prompt.

zh.title: 马克·洛尔表示AI将很快使任何人都能开餐厅
zh.summary: Wonder计划利用AI驱动的机器人厨房创建"餐厅工厂"，使创业者能够通过简单的提示启动虚拟食品品牌。该举措展示了AI在食品服务自动化和创业中不断扩大的作用。

title: Nuro receives driverless testing permit ahead of Uber robotaxi service launch
summary: Nuro, a Silicon Valley autonomous vehicle startup, has received a permit to conduct driverless testing, marking a significant milestone ahead of potential support for Uber's robotaxi service expansion.
content: The Silicon Valley AV startup has not started driverless testing yet.

zh.title: Nuro在Uber无人出租车服务推出前获得无人驾驶测试许可证
zh.summary: 硅谷自动驾驶汽车初创公司Nuro获得了进行无人驾驶测试的许可证，这标志着在可能支持Uber无人出租车服务扩展之前的一个重要里程碑。
